TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Malta, title = Malta, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Malta} }

S.FORM: Malta hya' ga cyux maki' tay 35 50 N, 14 35 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 316 sq km (maki' tay 208ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 316 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 415,196. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 32.30% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 66.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Valletta. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 21 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, aring ryax 4 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Malta hya' ga cyux maki' tay 35 50 N, 14 35 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 316 sq km (maki' tay 208ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 316 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 415,196. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 32.30% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 66.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Valletta. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 21 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, aring ryax 4 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: malta ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a *alletta. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mqiru Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a marie-louis~…ēe ¶~ ®oleiro pre ¶~ ®a, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
